description: Neo-Nazi group formed in 1988 in Dallas, Texas, focused on producing and promoting white power rock music. It has chapters in the US, Canada, Europe, Australia, and New Zealand, and is described as the best-organized neo-Nazi skinhead group in the US. Members have been involved in violent attacks and hate crimes, though not centrally organized. The group maintains an active recruitment strategy and encourages military enlistment for a race war.
